TL;DR A genuinely great game that was cursed with a terrible player base. 

I do really love this game, I think what they devs are trying to achieve here is awesome, and already has a fantastic basis, but largely due to player base, enjoying this game is a coin-toss

sometimes, you'll have an intensely competitive, exciting team-work heavy game, with highs and lows that will leave you feeling great.
Unfortunately thats not most games. It seems that a large portion of the player base of this game is exclusively ramen noodle hair'd 17 year old boys with Ronaldo profile pics. they do nothing but demand the ball, use too many skill moves and lose possession, then call you a slur on mic and spam the "GOOD JOB!" voice command. I literally have everyone's mic permanently muted because i cant go 3 games without someone calling me a hate slur.

but unlike 90% of the negative reviews on this game, i want to offer up some ideas instead of exclusively complaining and declaring a game with an active player base a "dead game" like an immature 12 year old.

Ideas: 
team re-queue: allow you to queue up again with your team-mates if some/all opt in. some games have an option to remain as a team with the random players youre matched up with, if a system like this was implemented, i would be so hyped, the best moments in this game is when everyone is working together, marking enemies, defending the box, making passes, communicating, linking up etc. when you're blessed with good teammates, it makes the game feel fantastic, but most of the time, you're stuck queueing up alone again and are matched with toxic players who dont want to work together and blame each other for every mistake, I think the devs should add an option for you and your team-mates to opt in to queuing up together again from the end result screen, similar to the requeue option you get at the end of a match, i think this would greatly improve the multiplayer experience.

better tutorials: I genuinely think most of the problems with the player base could be fixed if the devs were more clear about the way team work should play out (although, the entire prologue and tutorial sequence, does hammer this in, but based on other reviews and the player base, it seems thats not enough) there perhaps could me a higher incentive system to playing as a team, at the end of matches, it shows you how many passes, interceptions, saves, goals, and assists you had, but progression is mostly tied to end results, which is especially problematic in ranked mode, you will put in a great performance, but lose all your rp because you got matched with toxic teammates who score own goals bcuz you didnt pass every ball up to them as they wait in the opposition's penalty box. perhaps alternate progression based on individual performance would be counter-intuitive to the intent of teamwork but its just an idea, i find it frustrating trying my best with negative teammates and getting nothing for it.

less heavy monetization: i understand it takes money to fund development, i just think there could be some improvements to customization thats not exclusively monetized, but honestly, i like these devs, get your bag girly <333 

custom clubs? badges?: this next one is more abstract, but im fiending for the option to make a club badge to wear like real football clubs, it could function similar to a halo icon editor, with pre-gen art you could combine and customize to wear on your outfits, it could maybe function similar to how the patterns work in customization, but i really think it could be benneficial to the intent of working as a team to win matches, it could make players feel more unified and also encourage you connecting with other players, you can invite ppl to your club, and have a list of players you can invite to queue with, just a more central hub for team-based play i think will be positive

overall, this is a great game, despite what angry men online say, its clear the devs really do care about this game, i follow their social media and theyre regularly posting updates, community shared clips, fun new ideas etc. and the reaction is almost always "add *insert thing* already!" "DEAD GAME" or something hateful, i really love this game, and want it to thrive, Thank you devs, keep it up, <33

Recommended with a big ahh “but.”
Rematch is still a special game and the core gameplay is genuinely fun. I’ve put a ridiculous amount of hours in for a reason.

That said, the current state is rough compared to what it used to be. A lot of issues linger way too long, some updates feel like they push the game away from what made it great, and the overall direction has been inconsistent. It’s frustrating because this used to be one of the best games I’ve played, and you can still see that potential, it’s just being held back by dev decisions and slow fixes.

If you’re new, you’ll probably still have a good time, just don’t expect a perfectly polished experience right now. I’m recommending it because the foundation is still strong, but I really hope the devs tighten up, listen more, and get the game back to the level it deserves.

The average man weighs 180 pounds in the US. That's an estimated 37.2 trillion cells, or 3.27 × 10^28 atoms. Even so, if the word "hate" were written on each atom, there would not be enough to express the loathing I feel for this atrocious creation.

This abomination feeds upon the dreams of small children on Christmas after receiving it, getting crushed over and over by baboon-faced, basement-dwelling troglodytes who use the cheapest strategies on the easiest characters to see imaginary numbers grow and reach a sort of soyboy nirvana.

If you're looking for something to do this Friday after a long day of work, consider these questions: "Do I hate myself?", "Can I replace this keyboard/controller?", or "Is there anything better to do?"

If any of these are true, consider activities like playing in the street blindfolded or the 126 mph no-hands challenge. Any of these would be a better option. Then again, i will probably play this game again tomorrow

I've been playing this game since its release. After many months, the same bugs persist as at launch, and with each round, I feel like it's getting worse. There are bugs that have been there since the beginning, and no one seems to be doing anything about them.

My favorite bug is when you become a ghost as a player, and you can no longer receive the ball. You can't attack opponents either; you can still shoot, but you can't do anything else. Being a goalkeeper is impossible because the ball flies straight through your face.

Other bugs include connection problems where you can't join for some reason, and the game crashes.

The only positive thing I can say about all the "updates" they've made is that there's a report system (yes, it wasn't there at launch...).

Otherwise, apart from the season number, nothing has really changed in the game—it's all cosmetic. That this game isn't free-to-play is a miracle in itself, because bugs aren't fixed and the gameplay remains completely unchanged, which would be perfectly fine if things actually worked as intended. Just slide tackles are something you can do, but shouldn't, as they NEVER accomplish anything due to the numerous I-frames. The ball has a completely idiotic physics that no one seems to believe. The ball is blocked, it just flies slightly to the left or right... it doesn't change its trajectory at all. Maybe it's just my imagination, but the opposing goalkeeper can always catch the ball and sometimes even jump all the way to the halfway line and can't be fouled.

This game had potential, but the developers only seem to care about skins anymore, not the game itself.

Potential for a great game, but still a lot lacking. Needs other competitive game modes (single player seriously lacking), the controls are EXTREMELY weird (the ball consistently goes through your body and you don't touch it, but then sometimes you hulk slam it 20 feet away from you, first touches are not consistent unless you are very specific with the A button, goalie diving is hit or miss whether you actually dive the direction you're pointing, that's just a few of the dozens i can point out), the graphics are so jerky it looks like there just weren't enough animations to string together to make a fluent animation during anything but jogging (picture like a 3D version of super mario, the start and end picture are there, but they really want your mind to interpolate the rest between those animations), servers are so lagging on top of that it becomes unfun to play sometimes. I want to come back to this later and like it, and I think i gave it an honest shot for now.

Edit: Played a few more hours. Going to reiterate my disdain for the goalie controls and lagging. Like it's a 70% chance your goalie dives the direction you point and the character movement is so laggy you can barely predict when to tackle. This desperately needs a fix

Walking through the ball without gaining possesion is probably the worst feeling I've experienced in a video game. 

After returning since launch, I can say they've been able to realease 3 battle passes. While the game doesn't feel anybetter than it did half a year ago.

I heard there were new animations but every animation looks just as janky as launch.

The mechanics are just trying to get frame perfect movements and touches to make your character model glitche out. Not mechanics planned out by the devs but more of a "I didn't know you could do that." so we'll balance it as a feature. Without considering if these mechanics work well with the basic controls of the game.

In my opinion they don't. They want to be a high flying action game with smash type wave dash/cancels and high individual impact.

When they made a team game, with basic ball handling controls and emphasis on stamina management. 

The game feels the worst when you're working well with your team and your opponent glitches there way down the field and hops 3 times from one side of the box to the other to score.

if you're playing a team game where everyone's character is supposed to be a high level athlete and you feel like you can't make your character move the same way as someone else there's a problem. It's not an issue in a fighting games but this isn't about breaking the games limits in a 1 v 1.

There's so much skill expression within the the basic controls. It's sad to see barely anyone really get the best use of the basic ball control skills because they've focused on learning the most broken mechanics.

Get rid or the "found features" please for the love of god.

There's room for developer coded skills.

You had all the time in the world to think of actual cool skills that could've been implemented with purpose on RB+X+Y or RB+A+B. Instead we get whatever we "discover"

If they wanted the ippy slide in the game it would've have been animated with real hitboxes. Now that it's a feature tells me the games not going to get any real work done on it.

There's no plans to refine the gameplay. They'll bandaid fix what comes up and provide battlepasses.

Mid game whose whole skill expression is animation cancelling. Thus the only way to learn tricks even at a lower level is to find them online. You can be decent without these obviously but the game is too shallow mechanically. Keepers are also very OP, and scoring a one-on-one versus a decent keeper is almost impossible without some kind of trick.

Also don't believe the people saying it has great potential and skill-expression. You can't have a game so reliant on animations and a fake ball control (lock-on) system have a realistic and satisfying skill-curve. They always take a lot away from player control.

The childish community, laggy servers and the non-competitive pricing combined with this game's fundamental flaws explain why the game had a good player base for about 2 months. Had some fun when I bought it but it was very short-lived. (Also you can see that like half the positive reviews were written by players with 3-20 hours).

Just an all around horrible game. Ranked system is depressing. You either win by a landslide or get SA'd by your opponents. While writing this review, I've come to terms with the fact that I have thrown away precious hours of my life on this game which is a really sad feeling. Time I could have spent bettering myself. Instead I threw those moments away carelessly, never to be seen again. I fear my final days of life will be spent withering away in resentment and regret due to the fact that I consciously gave up a portion of my limited time on this earth to Rematch. Please, truly consider your actions before playing this game. Just take a brief moment to weigh out your options. You have free will to do anything you want... Do you really want to waste your God-given gift on this game? Zoom out and try to get a grasp on the greater scheme of things. You are granted such limited time in this reality/existence, time you will yearn for in your end days. Take action over yourself and become a better person. This game could never do that for you.

Edit 1: I'm getting better at passing and having some success in ranked. Game still buggy slop but it's ight.

This game is awesome. Super fun to move around in, rewards good teamplay, and fulfills an EASHL hunger I've never had satiated on PC. Look at the amount of hours on the negative reviews and you'll see it's pretty much DOTA-syndrome of people who are addicted being pissed, which speaks volumes to how good this game is if you're a well-adjusted human being tbh. Only issue is the netcode can be very finicky, and laggy matches can be really frustrating as the game constantly tries to roll back to catch up. Definitely grab it on a sale if you enjoy team-focused multiplayer games or just sports games in general. Even if you don't like soccer/football, it's 100% worth a try.

i went into rematch expecting a competitive skill based experience where losing actually teaches you something what i got instead was a frustrating shallow mess that feels more like a tech demo than a finished game

the core gameplay sounds good on paper but in practice it falls apart fast controls feel floaty and unresponsive which completely kills any sense of precision or mastery when you lose it rarely feels like you were outplayed it feels like the game just didnt cooperate thats the worst thing a competitive game can do

matches get repetitive almost immediately theres very little depth or variety and once youve seen a few games youve basically seen everything no meaningful progression no satisfying learning curve and nothing that keeps you coming back other than stubbornness

balance is another issue some mechanics feel overtuned while others are borderline useless which makes matches feel uneven and random instead of fair and strategic when a game markets itself around competition thats a huge problem

overall rematch feels like a game that wanted to be competitive but forgot to be fun first until the controls are tightened the depth is expanded and the overall experience feels intentional instead of half baked i cant recommend it

The game has a solid core idea, 3v3 and 5v5 modes are mostly balanced with the pitch design. The new goalkeeper animations look nice. The priority system for shots and passes is sometimes arbitrary (even accounting for boost and positioning). The dribbling animations are partly clunky (esp. quick side moves) and are abused.
Edit: Less bugs observed. Servers seem somewhat stable.
Before edit: (cannot recommend) What has been particularly annoying lately is the accumulation of bugs. Out of seven matches, twice there were too few players, once the match started with a numerical disadvantage, once ball control was simply not possible (this is a really historical bug!), and once a player crashed mid game. Only two matches were more or less regular. At the moment, it’s barely playable. Cannot recommend, try again later.

I think Sloclap have succeeded here in making a game where the "feeling" of playing it is similar to the feeling of playing football. Yes, the game is very different to real football -- there is no out of bounds, the keeper can pick up the ball from a back pass, there is no offside, everyone can do crazy acrobatic kicks, etc -- but when I quickly glance at the mini map to see where my teamates are, receive the ball in the midfield, take a touch into space, and play a pass in behind to a teammate, I get a similar feeling to the years I played in real life, much more so than playing something like FIFA, despite that game looking more photorealistic.

There are a few annoying quirks of the game, such as rainbow spam, iffy hit detection, and semi-rare glitches. However, I honestly am baffled by the many negative reviews that focus on bugs. Many seem to think they ruin the game, but I honestly don't experience bugs too often. In the rare occasions I've lost a match due to a bug, it hasn't been a huge deal -- in my experience it is pretty quick to get into another match.  

I've had tons of fun playing this with friends. Building up team goals, defending a lead, coming back from 3-0 down to beat a team full of annoying idiots spamming meta dribbling moves, I've had a blast playing this game.

Wo fängt man da an?
Im Grunde ist das Spiel nicht schlecht, aber leider ist es trotz vieler Bugfix-Updates usw. immer noch von ruckeligem Gameplay, hakeligen Animationen und einem schlecht organisierten Matchmaking (primär auf Ranked bezogen) geplagt.

Es gibt zwar ein Rangsystem, allerdings sind die (Skill-)Stufen meiner Erfahrung nach sehr schlecht voneinander getrennt, und es passiert häufig, dass man mit einem niedrigen Rang mit deutlich höheren Rängen in ein Match gepackt wird. Gerade dieses Durcheinander beim Matchmaking macht das Spiel so unbelohnend. Man hat zwei bis drei gute Matches mit angemessenen Gegnern, und plötzlich wird man für 4 oder mehr Matches völlig dominiert, weil die Gegner mehrere Stufen über einem selbst sind.

Hinzu kommen ein Haufen AFK- oder trollende Mates, die meinen, sie seien Ronaldinho höchstpersönlich und müssten alles im Alleingang machen. Klar hat jeder seine Stärken und Schwächen, aber das Spiel ist immer noch ein Teamspiel... Leider gibt es auch immer noch keine Melde- oder Bewertungsmechanik, um gegen solche Mates vorgehen zu können.

Einfach ein unbelohnendes Game. Schade.

As someone who has played this game since the beta and has gotten elite more times than one, the game just is starting to feel terrible more and more. At first when the season 2 dribbling update came out I thought it was cool, but as for it now? Its unskillful and easy to do. It took me about 2 minutes to figure out how to dribbling my way past anyone, and now when I load into quick matches I see these "newbies" and other player who are otherwise clearly new dribbling as such with zero effort or skill.  It has become something anyone can do because its just so easy. Whether your high skill or low skill player you can just press dribble look a direction space bar, then turn look a different direction guard stance dribble space bar then extra effort, and its easy past a defender.  I have held off on recommending this game for awhile to see where this game is heading, but its getting to the point off I am just going to get elite every season then hop off until the next just to get the rewards. I am not suggesting how to fix anything but I do think having dribbling moves/animations that would be on a cooldown and lets say there are 3 to do, would be alot more skillful and engaging offensively and defensively than what is currently presented. Another thing to note is the new goalie animations that came with season 2, while I think they look nice they kinda left me with an even deeper feeling when I play goalie. As a goalkeeper in real life in rematch its just so painful to see goalkeeper so weak. Another thing I find sloppy is the store, its like 4 boxes of something random to buy and a bundle on the left side, coming out of the rematch beta and going into full release I was hoping for a bigger and better shop. But I won't go into the too much. I have spent my time playing this game and I will not stop, but I cannot recommend that you the reader should buy it or if you already have it give it a positive review in its current state.

Avis court : C'est un bon jeu. Une communauté bienveillante mais parfois irritable comme pour tous les jeux compétitifs (il n'y a pas de discussion autre que les 4 messages pré-réglé par le jeu et cela suffit amplement, pas de système de signalement non plus). Peut parfois décourager les joueurs solo qui lancent des Ranked (Match classé) car il n'y a que du 3v3 ou 5v5.

Avis plus détaillé: Le jeu est vraiment fun outre les mauvais joueurs et la difficulté des Ranked. Il y a parfois quelques bugs gênants (affiche une erreur de connexion pour se reconnecter à un match alors qu'il n'y avait pas assez de joueurs pour débuter le match en question -> attendre quelques secondes avant de relancer une recherche et le bug disparaît, le ballon parfois proche de la surface n'est pas récupéré par les pieds du gardien de but (il faut toujours être en position d'arrêt avec LT/L2 sur les manettes pour attraper le ballon en tant que gardien, en dehors de la surface vous serez surtout en sprint et donc pas dans la position adéquate..) donc il faut actionner un tir ou une passe pour ne pas laisser le ballon à l'adversaire, les couleurs des maillots proposées au début de match ne prennent pas en compte les couleurs adverses et donc vous pouvez vous retrouver avec la même palette de couleur ce qui peut rendre difficile la distinction des joueurs sur le terrain -> la minicarte affiche bien des couleurs différentes et il suffit de soit laisser la couleur se choisir toute seule en début de match ou de regarder dans l'écran de chargement de la partie en haut à gauche la couleur associée aux adversaires lorsqu'ils rejoignent le chargement mais vous avez peu de temps pour le faire) mais dans la plupart des cas le jeu fonctionne correctement et les bugs "maîtrisés" découvert par la communauté permettent avec un peu d'entraînement de parfois tromper l'adversaire (rien d'abusif, cela ne donne pas d'avantage réel dans le jeu). Les succès sont faciles à débloquer et certains donnent un peu de challenge car ils dépendent de vos coéquipiers (ex: faire une passe décisive en étant gardien de but)
ёбанная помойка, не покупайте никогда в жизни, худшее во что я играл

完全不推荐，各种方面的问题一大堆，绝对可以摧毁你的游玩体验，远远配不上售价。
——————————————————————————————————————————
这份评测极其主观，是我怀着非常巨大的怨气写下的，谨代表我个人观点。
——————————————————————————————————————————
我只玩5V5排位模式，大致说一下问题：
  一：极其蛋疼的匹配机制，人数少导致只能在特定时间可以比较快进入对局，也因此会有段位差距大的玩家匹配在一局游戏中，新手容易被大哥乱秀操作打崩心态。同样因为人少，可能一样的玩家不同分队打很多局，时间久了之后每把都能碰见熟悉的Id，被Neymar吃一下午分就老实了。

  二：看似方便的，可以随时键鼠、手柄切换的操作方式。这绝对是重量级的问题，两种操作方式的玩家会出现在同一局游戏中，造成的对游戏体验的损失绝对是毁灭性的，之后会详细说明。

  三：良莠不齐的队友。你能遇见各种形态的“球员”，永远在前场等队友断球之后踢单刀；一拿到球就死命盘带不分地点时间眼里只有球；落后两个球就开始秒退和往自家球门狂轰滥炸；“干得漂亮”和“感谢”发个不停的压力怪————你完全没有办法避免和这样的玩家组队，单排运气不好可能会一直被神人队友折磨，如果心理承受能力不够强或者找不到固排车队，很容易打崩心态（PS：愿意配合和心态好的玩家也不少其实，不过反面教材留下的负面印象太深刻了）

  四：烂到家的判定机制。面对高空球已经早早跳起瞄好了解围方向，传球动作已经做出来了结果对面直接把球拿下或者腾空射门。守门员已经做出了下地抱住球的动作，结果瞬间站起身来把球漏过去。这类情况屡见不鲜。各种拿球动作的前摇、音效甚至手柄的震动反馈都已经出现了，结果神奇的判定机制发力，直接给你撤回或者直接让其他人的判定生效。不知道这样做的意义是什么，加时赛十分钟给你来一个下地漏球直接肺气炸了。

  五：我认为最恶心的问题：两种操作方式的差异性。我个人只玩手柄，但是朋友是用键鼠，根据反馈两种操作方式都有问题，但我觉得游戏在强迫想要到达更高水平的玩家使用键鼠，如果坚持使用手柄，有时候真的是拼尽全力无法战胜。键鼠的问题主要就是一个：逆天的传球机制，不多熟悉的话新手很容易传歪甚至直接传进球门。
         但是！！手柄的问题除了射门瞄准困难之外，更有问题是无法通过操作弥补的——就是游戏的盘带动作系统，很难想象一个足球游戏键鼠玩家可以一秒钟做三个花式动作各种变向，而且可以一直做到没有体力为止。用手柄玩不仅达不到这种操作频率，防守这种盘带的时候摇杆转移视角的速度也完全跟不上，劣势巨大。更有甚者有的动作只能用键鼠完成。一个就是用挑传而不是脚后跟起球的方式把球轻微挑起，在自己身前很近的位置直接衔接射门。还有一个在单刀球时脚后跟起球，球在空中时跳起把球撞进球门，而不是用传球键完成头球。这些动作只能用键鼠操作，（第一个可能是我没找到方法，第二个我确定手柄做不出来），直接拉开了两种操作方式的上限。我在100多个小时后才意识到，难道从头开始改掉手柄操作的习惯去学习键鼠吗？我不认为这款游戏值得。

——————————————————————————————————————————————————
总而言之，这款游戏让我懊恼甚至愤怒的时候远远多于让我愉快的时候，我很难认同这是一款合格的游戏，想要尝鲜的玩家谨慎购买。
（全篇谨代表个人观点）

一定時間経つとボールを足元に落とす仕様があるのですが、

残念です。

プレイ人口も少ないのでマッチングも中々出来ないので購入するメリットも

This is a Jungian perversion of soccer where the ball bounces off walls and racial caricatures do backflips to kick the ball around in ways that violate physics. In REMATCH, there are no referees, each possession is a chain of flagrant fouls that compound into abstract Talmudist sorcery. You are not in control of the ball in REMATCH, that right goes exclusively to the shedim who might at any moment decide to send it back in time or spatially distort it into your opponent's possession. I have even seen my teammates ability to touch the ball revoked entirely for the match. At the time of writing this REMATCH has no actual rematch function. You will pay 40 dollars for this game to pleasure itself while lying straight to your face, open wide. The gameplay is comparable to sitting unbuckled in a NASA centrifuge with a hangover, trying to play hacky sack with a bag of vomit from last night's relapse. This game is insidious. Some of you may not have a group of 5 friends who will play this game with you, what I would say to you is abandon all hope. We have succumbed to the Argonautic temptation of queuing 5v5s down a man only to be consistently matched with the worst gamers in the Western Hemisphere who will fluoride stare at you after scoring a point on your own goal. These people have the reaction time of a traffic light with ping so high you'd wonder if they were playing from the trans-Neptunian region of outer space. I'm American so obviously I don't believe in the cultural importance of soccer, this game is a victory lap for Satan and his forces. Tekkers mate!

reviews.review:
Проект, который родился мёртвым, не сможет ничего набрать и загнётся через некоторое время. Сервера просто сломаны и уничтожены в нулину. Делаешь подкат прямо в типа, прямо в мяч? Пролетишь сквозь, как пуля через масло. Пытаешься дать пасс? Мяч улетит куда угодно, возможно даже перелетит Юпитер, но точно не туда куда нужно. Игра стоит 12 к тенге в Казахстане и 2 к рублей в России. По скидончику +- 700 рублей. Теперь спрашивается, за что? Или это интимный вопрос, на который никто не даст ответ? Мне хватило часа, чтобы понять какой это кусок калла, а не игра. Жалко, что не могу сделать возврат, так как это ключ, а ещё печальнее, что деньги друга. Печально, что так получилось. Нынче у нас даётся наценка якобы на "красивейшие игрульки", а не на нормальное качество. 
Вообще не рекомендую
tinha muito potencial, mas ficou uma merda

When I originally got this game on launch, I was underwhelmed, and uninstalled pretty quickly. A few months later a friend convinced me to give it another shot, and I'm glad I did. Playing with other people who try to be competitive is really rewarding. There's a lot of depth to the techniques used by high level players, and trying to learn these skills gets addicting fast. Highly recommend if you have a friend group to play with, or are willing to make new friends through the discord servers dedicated to this game. If you just play with randos, you will have to deal with toxic behaviors, or frustrating lack of skill, just like any other online competitive game. 

I do have to note however, this game does have a lot of bugs. Most games you play, you won't encounter them, but when you do, it's very frustrating. One of the most common bugs is losing the ability to interact with the ball during a match. You'll just ghost right through it. The fix is to leave the match, and then immediately reconnect. Stuff like that is super annoying to deal with. I'm sure the bugs will be addressed over time, but it's something you should be aware of before playing.

Tinha tudo para ser um dos maiores jogos competitivos, não tem nenhum concorrente direto, a gameplay é unica, porem a empresa esta nem ai pro game, desde o lançamento n teve um unico patch q n acarretou em uma serie de bugs grotescos ao game, n houve uma unica melhoria significativa ou até mesmo algo q torne a experiencia de gameplay mais agradavel.

A ranked é pessima para qualquer um q n jogue em time full, matchmaking ridiculo onde são colocados players do gold, prata ou até mesmo bronze para jogar com e contra jogadores no maior elo do game.

A experiencia casual do game é podre, n houve um modo de jogo que veio com alguma novidade q torna-se ele divertido.

Cosmeticos feitos com ma vontade que n despertam nenhuma vontade de consumir os conteudos novos do jogo, repetitivos e q a maioria n acrescentam nd como efeitos ou animações diferentes, são simples e sem graça.

O jogo atualmente se mantem apenas pela pequena player base d jogadores q estao competindo ainda no cenario amador do jogo, ja que a empresa n teve o menor intuito de investir nesse lado competitivo e todos os campeonatos são feitos pela propria comunidade.

No geral esse jogo n vale nem um pouco a pena ser comprado, a experiencia de fato sera muito mais frustrante do q divertida, é uma pena ver um jogo simplesmente perder pra ele mesmo, não existe um unico jogo para competir em publico com ele e ainda assim esta perdendo mais e mais jogadores dia apos dia.

Reached 200 hrs on this game it might be one of the worst experiences I have ever had on an online game. This game was WAAAAY better pre-release its actually inhumanely crazy, all these "devs" do is add HORRIBLE Balenci and Puma collabs without any regard to the actual experience of the game and add updates that continously strip you of the fun. They have 3v3s, 4v4s, and 5v5s on unranked but we STILL dont have 4v4s ranked after months of this game releasing. Ranked 3v3s is one of the worst modes in this game, its just a glorified marathon simulator when you dont have the ball in the last minute, you could call it a skill issue but it removes the purpose of this game and it makes it unplayable. After reaching Elite on both modes for every season they have been available I can clearly say that this game is nowhere near a $30 price mark, it should MAX be like $10 or even FREE, this game will never reach a high tier level of online gaming as the "devs" don't have any care in the world for the playerbase or their own game.

Prime example of what listening to the wrong community gets you.
A game that was once burning with potential is still as solved as it was in Season 0, and has no way of improving its skill ceiling barring executing glitches that the players call "techs".
There are some bugs that can be considered techs, and I'm all for pushing a game to its limit, but my brother in christ why have they not patched the flicker / 180?
You face one direction, dribble move with the camera pointed the other direction, and suddenly the ball and you can now move omnidirectionally with constant animation cancels that DO NOT LOOK GOOD.
Let me not mention how much strength the goalkeeper has in a 5v5 due to how SAFE they are. Competitive's back bone is built on back passes which makes the game a slow paced mess of resetting for every tiny mistake made.
The competitive scene is built on players who enjoy this sort of gameplay, and enjoy the glitches, so the game isn't able to leave its juvenile state.

Unlucky Sloclap. Fix the game or move onto Sifu 2 or, better yet, Absolver 3.

This is a great game. Buggy? Definitely. But the developers ARE committed to making a great experience. They are time and time again fixing bugs, polishing exploits into actual mechanics instead of removing them, and adding flow and movement to make things feel snappy. Scoring feels great. Defending feels great. Yeah, you’re going to run into rollback problems, netcode issues, times where you go “what the ♥♥♥♥ was that that’s ridiculous” but it’s what happens with games that require good connection and perfect servers. It’s not perfect but it’s THE WAY to experience soccer in an arcade format. Not only all of that, but the game is incredibly approachable for new players. It’s not incredibly complicated and simplicity goes a long way. There’s a learning curve (of course) but anyone can get adjusted.

The only issue I personally have with the game is the player base. It is quite toxic. Leavers, throwers, ragers. But what’s new. They suck too and have issues. You won’t win them all.

This game is really good and pushing boundaries. Very worth your time.

Es gibt einen sehr nervigen Bug: Wenn ein Spieler den Ball hat und wegen Verbindungsproblemen aus der Runde fliegt, bleibt der Ball an dieser Stelle komplett verbuggt liegen. Die Runde kann dadurch nicht mehr beendet werden.

Dieser Bug sollte dringend behoben werden, da er ganze Matches kaputtmacht.

Fazit:
Tolles Spiel, aber dieser Fehler muss schnell gefixt werden.

Ужасная техническая реализация. Игра грузится около 500 тысячелетий. Что в саму игру, что в матчи. Затем выкидывает из матча и даёт штраф, хотя вина в игре, так как в других проектах всё ок. При возвращении в матч я не могу ничего делать, кроме ходьбы. Кроме этого, другие игроки говорят, что у моей модельки даже голова не подгрузилась. Ребят, вы сорвали куш с продаж этого нерабочего куса дерьма и не можете сделать хотя бы загрузку приемлемой, вы конченные ебанаты. Я вас ненавижу идиоты ♥♥♥♥♥. ♥♥♥♥ что там грузить? У вас лоу поли графика и 5 карт, это просто ♥♥♥♥♥♥.

El juego esta bien, la mayoria se creen personajes salidos de blue lock, el resto parece que solo tocan el juego en vez de cesped real, además la falta de sistema de reportes es esencial y se hecha de menos.
Si juegas con amigos solo hay dos resultados o te lo pasas genial o quioeres ir a casa de tu amigo a calentarle la cara porque se piensa que regatear durante 3 minutos de 5 que dura el partido perder la pelota y que te marquen es culpa de el portero.
En resumen:

PRO: Divertido, funcional, juega con compas, es increible que este juegazo de futbol lo haya hecho los mismos que absolver, sifu y no lo hayan llamardo sifurbo

Contra: No hay sistemas de reporte asi que esperate mononeuronales y gente con nombre y actitud sacada de blue lock pero mal, porque al menos en el anime marcan
